title: Advanced Guide

# Advanced Guide

This covers advanced topics for power users.

## Custom Themes

You can create custom themes by adding CSS files. The theme system supports variables.

### CSS Variables

Use these variables to customize colors:

- `--od-bg`: Background color
- `--od-fg`: Foreground color
- `--od-accent`: Accent color

### Dark Mode

Dark mode is supported via `prefers-color-scheme`. You can toggle it programmatically.

## Plugins

OpenDoc supports a plugin system.

### Built-in Plugins

- Callouts
- Table of Contents
- Image figures

## Related

See [[Getting Started]] for basics.
